user.title: Sign in with your hOn account
user.description:
Enter your Haier hOn app credentials. Same email and password you use on the mobile app.

⚠️ This integration is unofficial and uses the hOn API without authorization from Haier.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate your hOn account
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {email} are no longer valid. Enter the password again.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to hOn servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This hOn account is already configured.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The new credentials must belong to the same hOn account.

data_description.enable_debug: Raise this integration's log level to DEBUG (sign in, device discovery, polling, commands). Turn off to return to Home Assistant's configured level. MQTT realtime noise stays suppressed unless its own toggle is on.
data_description.enable_mqtt_debug: Make the MQTT realtime channel very verbose. Normally keep this off; it only covers this integration's MQTT logger, not the underlying AWS IoT libraries (use Home Assistant's logger config for those).
